title: INDIA bloc meeting LIVE: India's foreign policy ‘compromised’, says Congress chief Mallikarjun Kharge at key meet
description: INDIA bloc meeting LIVE: A total of 23 political parties are participating in the meeting and will rework their strategy to take on the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP). However, DMK and Arvind Kejriwal's Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) are set to skip the meeting.
